title: trichomanes calyculatum
intro: Trichomanes calyculatum, also known as the forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are thought to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Trichomanes calyculatum are believed to include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving wound healing. Trichomanes calyculatum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and digestive issues.
